# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-cache-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: low-latency-cache-service
    team: platform
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-cache-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: redis-cache
          image: redis:7.2-alpine
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-cache-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: low-latency-cache-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-cache-service
  ports:
    - port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      name: redis
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: direct-access-dns-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: direct-access-dns-service
    team: platform
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: direct-access-dns-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: direct-access-dns-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: coredns
          image: coredns/coredns:1.11.1
          args:
            - -conf
            - /etc/coredns/Corefile
          ports:
            - containerPort: 53
              name: dns-udp
              protocol: UDP
            - containerPort: 53
              name: dns-tcp
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9153
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8181
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: coredns-config
              mountPath: /etc/coredns
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: coredns-config
          configMap:
            name: coredns-config
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: direct-access-dns-service
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: direct-access-dns-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: direct-access-dns-service
  ports:
    - port: 53
      targetPort: 53
      name: dns-udp
      protocol: UDP
    - port: 53
      targetPort: 53
      name: dns-tcp
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9153
      targetPort: 9153
      name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-stream-processor
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: high-throughput-stream-processor
    team: data-engineering
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 4
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-throughput-stream-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-throughput-stream-processor
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: stream-processor
          image: confluentinc/cp-kafka-connect:7.5.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: connect-api
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: kafka
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: CONNECT_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS
              value: "kafka-broker-0:9092,kafka-broker-1:9092,kafka-broker-2:9092"
            - name: CONNECT_GROUP_ID
              value: "stream-processor-group"
            - name: CONNECT_REST_PORT
              value: "8083"
            - name: CONNECT_CONFIG_STORAGE_TOPIC
              value: "connect-configs"
            - name: CONNECT_OFFSET_STORAGE_TOPIC
              value: "connect-offsets"
            - name: CONNECT_STATUS_STORAGE_TOPIC
              value: "connect-status"
            - name: CONNECT_KEY_CONVERTER
              value: "org.apache.kafka.connect.json.JsonConverter"
            - name: CONNECT_VALUE_CONVERTER
              value: "org.apache.kafka.connect.json.JsonConverter"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 2Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 4Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /connectors
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /connectors
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-throughput-stream-processor
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: high-throughput-stream-processor
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-throughput-stream-processor
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      name: connect-api
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      name: kafka
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-metrics-collector
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: realtime-metrics-collector
    team: observability
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: realtime-metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: realtime-metrics-collector
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: metrics-collector-sa
      containers:
        - name: metrics-collector
          image: prom/prometheus:v2.47.0
          args:
            - --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
            - --storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus
            - --storage.tsdb.retention.time=24h
            - --web.enable-lifecycle
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: http-metrics
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/ready
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /-/healthy
              port: 9090
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          volumeMounts:
            - name: prometheus-config
              mountPath: /etc/prometheus
              readOnly: true
            - name: prometheus-storage
              mountPath: /prometheus
      volumes:
        - name: prometheus-config
          configMap:
            name: prometheus-config
        - name: prometheus-storage
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 10Gi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-metrics-collector
  namespace: performance-critical
  labels:
    app: realtime-metrics-collector
spec:
  selector:
    app: realtime-metrics-collector
  ports:
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      name: http-metrics
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: performance-critical
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    purpose: low-latency-services
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-direct-access-services
  namespace: performance-critical
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      mesh-bypass: "true"
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              istio-injection: enabled
        - podSelector: {}
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
        - protocol: UDP
